title: Define Wave 18 manager auth/session hardening and property form contract
description: Extend architecture docs with manager login/refresh/logout lifecycle decisions and create/edit property form payload contracts for native clients.
acceptance_criteria: Auth/session contract documents login, refresh retry boundaries, and forced re-auth behavior
Property form contract specifies create/edit request payload, validation rules, and error envelope
UI state map covers loading, success, validation errors, forbidden, and session-expired transitions
